title: OpenAI协调美国政府确保外籍研究员参与前沿AI开发
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
It was foreseeable that OpenAI would not make the same mistake as Anthropic.
They sought to coordinate directly with US authorities so they could release their next capable model without issues.
Via Financial Times
prinz
@deredleritt3r
10h
Financial Times, quoting a person close to OpenAI:
"In recent days, the [AI] industry has been working [with the USG] on ensuring foreign national researchers could continue to work on developing the most advanced models, a practice that the Anthropic directive has now banned." Show more
6:40 PM · Jun 15, 2026 41.8K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: OpenAI协调美国政府确保外籍研究员参与前沿AI开发
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 据Financial Times报道，OpenAI正在与美国政府协调，以确保外国国籍研究人员能继续参与最先进AI模型的开发--这一做法此前已被Anthropic的指令禁止。报道引述接近OpenAI的人士称，近期整个行业都在与美国政府合作，试图维持外籍研究人员在开发前沿模型中的参与。这暗示美国政府可能在全行业范围内限制非美国公民从事前沿AI研究。

key_excerpts.text: 据Financial Times报道，OpenAI正在与美国政府协调，以确保外国国籍研究人员能继续参与最先进AI模型的开发--这一做法此前已被Anthropic的指令禁止。报道引述接近OpenAI的人士称，近期整个行业都在与美国政府合作，试图维持外籍研究人员在开发前沿模型中的参与。这暗示美国政府可能在全行业范围内限制非美国公民从事前沿AI研究。
Post Log in Sign up Post Chubby♨️ @kimmonismus It was foreseeable that OpenAI would not make the same mistake as Anthropic.
They sought to coordinate directly with US authorities so they could release their next capable model without issues.

Via Financial Times prinz @deredleritt3r 10h Financial Times, quoting a person close to OpenAI: "In recent days, the [AI] industry has been working [with the USG] on ensuring foreign national researchers could continue to work on developing the most advanced models, a practice that the Anthropic directive has now banned.
